title: AmeriCorps NCCC — Forest Corps
body: 1,600+ hours of national service with the US Forest Service reducing wildfire risk across the Western US. Certified Type 2 Firefighter & Type A Sawyer.

title: Film & Media Arts
body: BA in Communication alongside my CS degree — the other half of why I care about frames that feel handmade, and the craft of moving images.

title: Other hobbies
